channel.title: Demand Radar Sample - construction & real-estate signals

item.title: Hilton breaks ground on 180-key hotel in Austin, Texas
item.description: Hilton breaks ground on a new 180-key Hampton hotel in Austin, Texas, with the property opening in 2027.

item.title: Brookdale senior living community begins renovation of 120-bed facility in Dallas, Texas
item.description: Brookdale assisted living community begins a full renovation of its 120-bed facility in Dallas, Texas, refreshing guestrooms and soft goods.

item.title: Developer breaks ground on 40-story office tower in Houston, Texas
item.description: A developer breaks ground on a 40-story office tower with retail and a parking garage in downtown Houston, Texas.

item.title: Marriott to open 250-room resort in San Antonio, Texas in Q3 2027
item.description: Marriott to open a 250-room resort in San Antonio, Texas in Q3 2027, now under construction.
